attributes.action: Fund Miguel's engine for the 1st state-owned platform game
attributes.additional_details: I'm Miguel, a 12-year-old autistic British citizen. I live in Brazil with Luana and Marcello, and I take a game programming course in Campo Grande, Rio de Janeiro, where I develop my projects. I ask the UK Government to officially adopt my game engine to build the first state-owned platform game. My engine is optimized to run perfectly on lower-end, budget computers, ensuring that young creators without high-end hardware can learn coding and logic. Let's make gaming inclusive for everyone!
attributes.background: I'm Miguel, 12 years, and I'm autistic. I live in Brazil with Luana & Marcello. I take a course here where I develop games. I ask the UK Govt to fund my engine and build the 1st state platform game. It runs on low-end PCs, helping youth learn coding. Let's make gaming inclusive!
